query: Do I have audiences with the same logic but different names?

trace.sql: SELECT a.DEFINITIONHASH, a.SEGMENTID AS segment_id_1, a.NAME AS name_1, b.SEGMENTID AS segment_id_2, b.NAME AS name_2 FROM dim_segment a JOIN dim_segment b ON a.DEFINITIONHASH = b.DEFINITIONHASH AND a.NAME <> b.NAME AND a.SEGMENTID < b.SEGMENTID
